title: ebenus lancea
intro: Ebenus lancea, also known as the spiny restharrow or purple restharrow, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its spiny stems and purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ebenus lancea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antimicrobial protection. Ebenus lancea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a dried root and leaf preparation.
